title: thymelaea hirsuta var. polygalifolia
intro: Thymelaea hirsuta var. polygalifolia, also known as the spiny thistle or prickly thistle, is a variety of the thistle plant that belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat gastrointestinal issues such as constipation and indigestion. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the spiny thistle is typically dried and used as an infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
